metadata.name: Finance demo KG v3
metadata.description: DEMO ONLY - minimal illustrative v3 KG for the SKI Framework reference implementation. NOT a production compliance KG (BSA/AML (illustrative) references are illustrative). Two rules with typed obligations, jurisdictional scope, effective-date intervals, and citations.

subjects.name: Customer Identification Program completion
subjects.description: Days elapsed from account opening to CIP completion.

subjects.name: Large wire transfers
subjects.description: Documentation coverage of business purpose on large outbound wires.

rules.name: CIP completion window
rules.description: Demo rule: CIP must complete within 30 days of account opening.

rules.name: Wire purpose documentation
rules.description: Demo rule: business-purpose documentation coverage on large wires must be 100%.

obligations.summary: Days to CIP completion must not exceed 30.
Business-purpose documentation coverage on large wires must be at least 100%.

citations.source_document: Demo - illustrative reference to the BSA Customer Identification Program rule (NOT a real legal citation)
Demo - illustrative reference to BSA recordkeeping requirements (NOT a real legal citation)
